evidence_fetchers_catalog.description: Catalog of all available evidence fetcher scripts

aws.name: Amazon Web Services
aws.access_method: AWS CLI via AWS SSO/read-only IAM role
aws.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use AWS CLI which must be installed and configured with a read-only AWS SSO/read-only IAM role.

auto_scaling_high_availability.name: Auto Scaling High Availability
auto_scaling_high_availability.description: Evidence for Auto Scaling group high availability configurations
auto_scaling_high_availability.instructions: Script: auto_scaling_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws autoscaling describe-auto-scaling-groups, aws autoscaling describe-launch-configurations
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

aws_component_ssl_enforcement.name: AWS Component SSL Enforcement
aws_component_ssl_enforcement.description: Evidence for SSL/TLS enforcement across AWS components including S3 buckets and RDS instances
aws_component_ssl_enforcement.instructions: Script: aws_component_ssl_enforcement_status.sh. Commands executed: aws s3api list-buckets, aws s3api get-bucket-policy, aws rds describe-db-instances, aws rds describe-db-parameters
solution_capabilities: Denial Of Service Protection: Amazon Web Application Firewall

aws_config_conformance_packs.name: AWS Config Conformance Packs
aws_config_conformance_packs.description: Evidence for AWS Config conformance pack compliance and rule evaluations
aws_config_conformance_packs.instructions: Script: aws_config_conformance_packs.sh. Commands executed: aws configservice describe-conformance-packs, aws configservice describe-conformance-pack-status, aws configservice get-conformance-pack-compliance-summary, aws configservice get-conformance-pack-compliance-details

aws_config_monitoring.name: AWS Config Monitoring
aws_config_monitoring.description: Evidence for AWS Config service monitoring and recording status
aws_config_monitoring.instructions: Script: aws_config_monitoring.sh. Commands executed: aws configservice describe-configuration-recorders, aws configservice describe-configuration-recorder-status, aws configservice describe-delivery-channels

backup_recovery_high_availability.name: Backup Recovery High Availability
backup_recovery_high_availability.description: Evidence for backup and recovery high availability configurations
backup_recovery_high_availability.instructions: Script: backup_recovery_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws backup list-backup-vaults, aws backup list-backup-plans
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

backup_validation.name: Backup Validation
backup_validation.description: Evidence for backup validation and compliance
backup_validation.instructions: Script: backup_validation.sh. Commands executed: aws backup list-backup-jobs, aws backup list-recovery-points

block_storage_encryption_status.name: Block Storage Encryption
block_storage_encryption_status.description: Evidence for EBS volume encryption status and configurations
block_storage_encryption_status.instructions: Script: block_storage_encryption_status.sh. Commands executed: aws ec2 get-ebs-encryption-by-default, aws ec2 get-ebs-default-kms-key-id, aws ec2 describe-volumes, aws efs describe-file-systems

cloudwatch_high_availability.name: CloudWatch High Availability
cloudwatch_high_availability.description: Evidence for CloudWatch monitoring high availability
cloudwatch_high_availability.instructions: Script: cloudwatch_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws cloudwatch describe-alarms, aws logs describe-log-groups
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

cloudtrail_configuration.name: CloudTrail Configuration
cloudtrail_configuration.description: Evidence for CloudTrail configuration showing audit event logging setup in AWS account/region
cloudtrail_configuration.instructions: Script: cloudtrail_configuration.sh. Commands executed: aws cloudtrail list-trails, aws cloudtrail get-trail, aws cloudtrail get-trail-status

database_high_availability.name: Database High Availability
database_high_availability.description: Evidence for database high availability configurations
database_high_availability.instructions: Script: database_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws rds describe-db-instances, aws rds describe-db-clusters
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

detect_new_aws_resource.name: Detect New AWS Resource
detect_new_aws_resource.description: Evidence for AWS Config and EventBridge setup for new resource detection and monitoring
detect_new_aws_resource.instructions: Script: detect_new_aws_resource.sh. Commands executed: aws configservice describe-configuration-recorders, aws events list-rules, aws sns list-topics
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
Denial Of Service Protection: Amazon Web Application Firewall
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

efs_high_availability.name: EFS High Availability
efs_high_availability.description: Evidence for EFS high availability configurations
efs_high_availability.instructions: Script: efs_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws efs describe-file-systems, aws efs describe-mount-targets
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

eks_high_availability.name: EKS High Availability
eks_high_availability.description: Evidence for EKS cluster high availability configurations
eks_high_availability.instructions: Script: eks_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws eks list-clusters, aws eks describe-cluster, aws eks list-nodegroups, aws eks describe-nodegroup
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

eks_least_privilege.name: EKS Least Privilege
eks_least_privilege.description: Evidence for EKS cluster least privilege access controls and RBAC configurations
eks_least_privilege.instructions: Script: eks_least_privilege.sh. Commands executed: aws eks describe-cluster, aws eks list-pod-identity-associations, aws eks list-addons

guard_duty.name: GuardDuty Configuration
guard_duty.description: Evidence for GuardDuty threat detection configuration
guard_duty.instructions: Script: guard_duty.sh. Commands executed: aws guardduty list-detectors, aws guardduty get-detector, aws guardduty get-findings
solution_capabilities: User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

iam_identity_center.name: IAM Identity Center
iam_identity_center.description: Evidence for IAM Identity Center configurations
iam_identity_center.instructions: Script: iam_identity_center.sh. Commands executed: aws sso-admin list-instances, aws sso-admin list-permission-sets
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

iam_policies.name: IAM Policies
iam_policies.description: Evidence for IAM policy configurations and compliance
iam_policies.instructions: Script: iam_policies.sh. Commands executed: aws iam list-policies, aws iam get-policy, aws iam get-policy-version
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

iam_roles.name: IAM Roles
iam_roles.description: Evidence for IAM role configurations including trust policies, attached policies, and instance profiles
iam_roles.instructions: Script: iam_roles.sh. Commands executed: aws iam list-roles, aws iam get-role, aws iam list-attached-role-policies, aws iam list-instance-profiles-for-role, aws iam get-account-password-policy
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

iam_users_groups.name: IAM Users and Groups
iam_users_groups.description: Evidence for IAM user and group configurations
iam_users_groups.instructions: Script: iam_users_groups.sh. Commands executed: aws iam list-users, aws iam list-groups, aws iam get-user, aws iam get-group
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

kms_key_rotation.name: KMS Key Rotation
kms_key_rotation.description: Evidence for KMS key rotation policies and status
kms_key_rotation.instructions: Script: kms_key_rotation.sh. Commands executed: aws kms list-keys, aws kms describe-key, aws kms get-key-rotation-status
solution_capabilities: Cryptographic Key Management: Amazon Key Management Service (KMS)

load_balancer_encryption_status.name: Load Balancer Encryption Status
load_balancer_encryption_status.description: Evidence for load balancer encryption configurations and SSL policies
load_balancer_encryption_status.instructions: Script: load_balancer_encryption_status.sh. Commands executed: aws elbv2 describe-load-balancers, aws elbv2 describe-listeners
solution_capabilities: Denial Of Service Protection: Amazon Web Application Firewall

load_balancer_high_availability.name: Load Balancer High Availability
load_balancer_high_availability.description: Evidence for load balancer high availability configurations
load_balancer_high_availability.instructions: Script: load_balancer_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws elbv2 describe-load-balancers, aws elbv2 describe-target-groups, aws elbv2 describe-load-balancer-attributes
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

network_resilience_high_availability.name: Network Resilience High Availability
network_resilience_high_availability.description: Evidence for network resilience and high availability configurations
network_resilience_high_availability.instructions: Script: network_resilience_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws ec2 describe-vpcs, aws ec2 describe-subnets, aws ec2 describe-route-tables
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

rds_encryption_status.name: RDS Encryption
rds_encryption_status.description: Evidence for RDS database encryption at rest and in transit
rds_encryption_status.instructions: Script: rds_encryption_status.sh. Commands executed: aws rds describe-db-instances, aws rds describe-db-clusters

route53_high_availability.name: Route 53 High Availability
route53_high_availability.description: Evidence for Route 53 high availability configurations
route53_high_availability.instructions: Script: route53_high_availability.sh. Commands executed: aws route53 list-health-checks, aws route53 get-health-check-status
solution_capabilities: Backup Recovery: Amazon Simple Storage Service (S3)
User-Level Data Backup Configuration: Amazon RDS (Postgres)

s3_encryption_status.name: S3 Encryption
s3_encryption_status.description: Evidence for S3 bucket encryption configurations and policies
s3_encryption_status.instructions: Script: s3_encryption_status.sh. Commands executed: aws s3api list-buckets, aws s3api get-bucket-encryption

security_groups.name: Security Groups
security_groups.description: Evidence for security group configurations and rules
security_groups.instructions: Script: security_groups.sh. Commands executed: aws ec2 describe-security-groups
solution_capabilities: Policy Enforcement Points: Amazon Security Groups

waf_all_rules.name: WAF All Rules
waf_all_rules.description: Evidence for all WAF rules and configurations
waf_all_rules.instructions: Script: waf_all_rules.sh. Commands executed: aws wafv2 list-web-acls, aws wafv2 get-web-acl, aws wafv2 list-rule-groups
solution_capabilities: Denial Of Service Protection: Amazon Web Application Firewall

waf_dos_rules.name: WAF DoS Rules
waf_dos_rules.description: Evidence for WAF DoS protection rules and configurations
waf_dos_rules.instructions: Script: waf_DoS_rules.sh. Commands executed: aws wafv2 list-web-acls, aws wafv2 get-web-acl
solution_capabilities: Denial Of Service Protection: Amazon Web Application Firewall

sentinelone.name: SentinelOne
sentinelone.description: SentinelOne-specific evidence collection scripts and fetchers for users, agents, XDR assets, cloud detection rules, and activities.
sentinelone.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use the SentinelOne REST API which requires SENTINELONE_API_URL and SENTINELONE_API_TOKEN environment variables. Authentication uses Api Token authorization header.

sentinelone_user_config.name: SentinelOne User Config
sentinelone_user_config.description: Retrieve SentinelOne user records and produce summary analysis (admin counts, 2FA, last login).
sentinelone_user_config.instructions: Script: userfetcher.py. Calls the SentinelOne API endpoint /web/api/v2.1/users using ApiToken authorization, pages with cursor, and writes JSON and CSV summary.

validation_rules.logic: IF record_count >= 0 THEN PASS (ensures script returned numeric count)

sentinelone_xdr_assets.name: SentinelOne XDR Assets
sentinelone_xdr_assets.description: Retrieve XDR asset inventory (containers, images, cloud resources) and summary counts.
sentinelone_xdr_assets.instructions: Script: xdrassetfetcher.py. Calls the SentinelOne API endpoint /web/api/v2.1/xdr/assets, supports cursor pagination, summarizes infectionStatus and assetStatus, writes JSON and CSV summary.

sentinelone_agents.name: SentinelOne Agents
sentinelone_agents.description: Retrieve agents information, containerized workload counts, cloud provider metadata, and optional agent counts endpoint.
sentinelone_agents.instructions: Script: agentfetcher.py. Calls /web/api/v2.1/agents (and /web/api/v2.1/agents/count), pages with cursor, collects cluster names and container/pod counts, writes JSON and CSV summary.

validation_rules.logic: IF reported_agent_count is null or reported_agent_count >= 0 THEN PASS (optional count may be missing)

sentinelone_cloud_detection_rules.name: SentinelOne Cloud Detection Rules
sentinelone_cloud_detection_rules.description: Retrieve custom cloud detection rules, last alert times and update timestamps.
sentinelone_cloud_detection_rules.instructions: Script: clouddetectionrules.py. Calls /web/api/v2.1/cloud-detection/rules with cursor pagination, extracts lastAlertTime and updatedAt fields, writes JSON and CSV summary.

sentinelone_activities.name: SentinelOne Activities
sentinelone_activities.description: Retrieve SentinelOne activity events for a set of activity types (FedRAMP list) and summarize activity types and descriptions.
sentinelone_activities.instructions: Script: activityfetcher.py. Calls /web/api/v2.1/activities with activityTypes filter (cursor pagination), aggregates activityType counts and primary descriptions, writes JSON and CSV summary.

validation_rules.logic: IF activity_type object exists THEN PASS

k8s.name: Kubernetes
k8s.description: Kubernetes and EKS-specific evidence collection scripts
k8s.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use kubectl which must be installed and configured for your Kubernetes cluster. For EKS clusters, use 'aws eks update-kubeconfig' to configure kubectl.

eks_microservice_segmentation.name: EKS Microservice Segmentation
eks_microservice_segmentation.description: Evidence for EKS microservice segmentation including network policies, security groups, and resource limits
eks_microservice_segmentation.instructions: Script: eks_microservice_segmentation.sh. Commands executed: kubectl get networkpolicies, kubectl describe daemonset aws-node, aws ec2 describe-instances

eks_pod_inventory.name: EKS Pod Inventory
eks_pod_inventory.description: Evidence for EKS pod inventory and security analysis
eks_pod_inventory.instructions: Script: eks_pod_inventory.sh. Commands executed: kubectl get pods, kubectl describe pods

kubectl_security.name: Kubectl Security
kubectl_security.description: Evidence for Kubernetes security configuration validation
kubectl_security.instructions: Script: kubectl_security.sh. Commands executed: kubectl get clusterroles, kubectl get clusterrolebindings, kubectl get networkpolicies

knowbe4.name: KnowBe4
knowbe4.description: KnowBe4 security awareness training evidence collection scripts
knowbe4.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use the KnowBe4 REST API which requires KNOWBE4_API_KEY environment variable. Note: KnowBe4 API access is only available for Platinum and Diamond customers. Authentication uses Bearer token authorization.

high_risk_training.name: Role Specific Training for High Risk Users
high_risk_training.description: Evidence for role-specific training compliance and completion status
high_risk_training.instructions: Script: high_risk_training.sh. Commands executed: KnowBe4 API calls for role-specific training data

security_awareness_training.name: Security Awareness Training
security_awareness_training.description: Evidence for security awareness training compliance and user completion status
security_awareness_training.instructions: Script: security_awareness_training.sh. Commands executed: KnowBe4 API calls for user training data and enrollments

developer_specific_training.name: Developer Specific Training
developer_specific_training.description: Evidence for developer specific security awareness training compliance and user completion status
developer_specific_training.instructions: Script: developer_specific_training.sh. Commands executed: KnowBe4 API calls for user training data and enrollments

module_based_summary.name: Module Based Summary
module_based_summary.description: Evidence for security awareness training summarized at the module level
module_based_summary.instructions: Script: module_based_summary.sh. Commands executed: KnowBe4 API calls for user training data and enrollments

okta.name: Okta
okta.description: Okta identity and access management evidence collection scripts
okta.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use the Okta REST API which requires OKTA_API_TOKEN and OKTA_ORG_URL environment variables. Authentication uses API Token authorization header.

okta_phishing_resistant_mfa.name: Okta Phishing-Resistant MFA (KSI-IAM-01)
okta_phishing_resistant_mfa.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-01 evidence: phishing-resistant MFA configuration and adoption (WebAuthn/security keys).
okta_phishing_resistant_mfa.instructions: Script: okta_phishing_resistant_mfa.py. Uses Okta APIs to collect phishing-resistant MFA (FIDO2/WebAuthn) configuration and adoption evidence. Output: okta_phishing_resistant_mfa.json
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

okta_passwordless_authentication.name: Okta Passwordless Authentication (KSI-IAM-02)
okta_passwordless_authentication.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-02 evidence: passwordless authentication enforcement and user enrollment (security keys / policy).
okta_passwordless_authentication.instructions: Script: okta_passwordless_authentication.py. Uses Okta APIs to collect passwordless authentication policy and enrollment evidence. Output: okta_passwordless_authentication.json
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

okta_non_user_accounts_authentication.name: Okta Non-User Accounts (KSI-IAM-03)
okta_non_user_accounts_authentication.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-03 evidence: service/non-user accounts and automation authentication (API tokens, OAuth apps).
okta_non_user_accounts_authentication.instructions: Script: okta_non_user_accounts_authentication.py. Uses Okta APIs to identify non-user/service accounts using definitive indicators and automation credentials. Output: okta_non_user_accounts_authentication.json
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

okta_just_in_time_authorization.name: Okta Just-in-Time Authorization (KSI-IAM-04)
okta_just_in_time_authorization.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-04 evidence: conditional access, group-based assignments, and recent access activity (JIT authorization).
okta_just_in_time_authorization.instructions: Script: okta_just_in_time_authorization.py. Uses Okta APIs to collect JIT authorization evidence (policies, rules, group-based access, activity). Output: okta_just_in_time_authorization.json
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

okta_least_privilege.name: Okta Least Privilege (KSI-IAM-05)
okta_least_privilege.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-05 evidence: privileged admin population and least-privilege posture (admins vs regular users).
okta_least_privilege.instructions: Script: okta_least_privilege.py. Uses Okta APIs to identify admins and summarize privileged access. Output: okta_least_privilege.json
solution_capabilities: Administrative Session: Okta IDaaS to Identity Center
Privileged Access: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)
Service Account Permissions: Amazon Identity and Access Management (IAM)

okta_suspicious_activity_management.name: Okta Suspicious Activity (KSI-IAM-06)
okta_suspicious_activity_management.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-06 evidence: suspicious activity monitoring, security events, and behavior detection.
okta_suspicious_activity_management.instructions: Script: okta_suspicious_activity_management.py. Uses Okta APIs to collect security event monitoring and behavior detection evidence. Output: okta_suspicious_activity_management.json

okta_automated_account_management.name: Okta Automated Account Management (KSI-IAM-07)
okta_automated_account_management.description: FedRAMP 20x KSI-IAM-07 evidence: automated account lifecycle management and account health monitoring.
okta_automated_account_management.instructions: Script: okta_automated_account_management.py. Uses Okta APIs to collect account lifecycle monitoring and health evidence. Output: okta_automated_account_management.json

gitlab.name: GitLab
gitlab.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use the GitLab REST API which requires project access toekns: GITLAB_PROJECT_*_API_ACCESS_TOKEN and GITLAB_PROJECT_*_URL environment variables for multi-project support. Authentication uses Bearer token with Project Access Tokens scoped to individual projects. Read permissions are required.

gitlab_ci_cd_pipeline_config.name: GitLab CI/CD Pipeline Configuration
gitlab_ci_cd_pipeline_config.description: Evidence for automated testing, security scanning, and deployment controls in .gitlab-ci.yml
gitlab_ci_cd_pipeline_config.instructions: Script: gitlab_ci_cd_pipeline_config.sh. Commands executed: GitLab API calls to retrieve project .gitlab-ci.yml and pipeline configuration

gitlab_project_summary.name: GitLab Project Summary
gitlab_project_summary.description: Evidence for repository configuration inventory including Terraform, Docker, and YAML configs
gitlab_project_summary.instructions: Script: gitlab_project_summary.sh. Commands executed: GitLab API to list repository tree and file metadata

gitlab_merge_request_summary.name: GitLab Merge Request Summary
gitlab_merge_request_summary.description: Evidence for change management: approvals, reviews, discussions, and compliance metrics
gitlab_merge_request_summary.instructions: Script: gitlab_merge_request_summary.sh. Commands executed: GitLab API to list merge requests, approvals, and discussions with pagination

rippling.name: Rippling
rippling.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use the Rippling REST API which requires RIPPLING_API_TOKEN environment variable. Authentication uses Bearer token authorization.

rippling_current_employees.name: Rippling Current Employees
rippling_current_employees.description: Evidence for list of current active employees from Rippling
rippling_current_employees.instructions: Script: rippling_current_employees.py. Commands executed: curl GET /platform/api/employees with limit/offset pagination

rippling_all_employees.name: Rippling All Employees
rippling_all_employees.description: Evidence for list of all employees from Rippling including terminated
rippling_all_employees.instructions: Script: rippling_all_employees.py. Commands executed: curl GET /platform/api/employees/include_terminated with limit/offset pagination

checkov.name: Checkov Security Scanning
checkov.description: Infrastructure as Code security compliance scanning with Checkov
checkov.access_method: Checkov CLI with optional GitLab API
checkov.access_method_description: The evidence fetcher scripts use Checkov CLI tool which must be installed via 'pip install checkov'. For GitLab repository scanning, GitLab API access tokens are required (GITLAB_PROJECT_*_API_ACCESS_TOKEN). For local or URL-based scanning, no additional authentication is needed.

checkov_terraform.name: Checkov Terraform Security
checkov_terraform.description: Evidence for Terraform infrastructure security compliance using Checkov
checkov_terraform.instructions: Script: checkov_terraform.sh. Commands executed: checkov --framework terraform with flexible configuration options. Supports multiple source types (GitLab, GitHub, local, URL) and customizable check filtering.

checkov_kubernetes.name: Checkov Kubernetes Security
checkov_kubernetes.description: Evidence for Kubernetes manifest security compliance using Checkov
checkov_kubernetes.instructions: Script: checkov_kubernetes.sh. Commands executed: checkov --framework kubernetes with flexible configuration options. Supports multiple source types (GitLab, GitHub, local, URL) and customizable check filtering.

ssllabs.name: Qualys SSL Labs
ssllabs.description: TLS/SSL configuration and certificate scanning via the Qualys SSL Labs API v4
ssllabs.access_method: Qualys SSL Labs API v4 with registered email
ssllabs.access_method_description: Scans are performed via the public Qualys SSL Labs API v4. A one-time email registration is required at https://api.ssllabs.com/api/v4/register. No credentials beyond the registered email are needed.

ssllabs_tls_scan.name: SSL Labs TLS/SSL Scan
ssllabs_tls_scan.description: Scans configured hosts via the Qualys SSL Labs API v4 and collects TLS grade, certificate validity, protocol support, and vulnerability evidence
ssllabs_tls_scan.instructions: Script: ssllabs_tls_scan.py. Calls the Qualys SSL Labs API v4 for each host in SSLLABS_HOSTS, polls until complete, and saves per-host JSON and a combined summary. Requires SSLLABS_EMAIL (registered with Qualys) and SSLLABS_HOSTS (comma-separated hostnames).
